summary: Those printed on New Syrtis and New Avalon

mechanics.name_guess: Those printed on New Syrtis and New Avalon
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 182 > history > Those printed on New Syrtis and New Avalon
mechanics.excerpt: Those printed on New Syrtis and New Avalon use hard- wearing but flexible plastic while those minted on Robinson are made paper. Each denomination is distinguished Dy color and size , with larger notes greater value. One side of each shows the Davion insignia and the image of the First Prince, while the other shows famous historical figures.
